{{Quote|Good work, people. We just put a Trade Federation base to sleep.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kael (officer)|Kael]] after the satellite was destroyed|<ref name="Star Wars: Battle for Naboo" />}}
'''Comm 4''' was a [[communications satellite]] established by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during its [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="Star Wars: Battle for Naboo" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> The [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] was used to reroute the control signal from the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control]] [[Vuutun Palaa/Legends|Ship]] down to a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Trade Federation base|base]]. Comm 4 was situated in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] above Naboo and was protected by heavy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] projected by three [[Slave circuit|slave]] satellites dispersed nearby. Comm 4 had several [[Missile launcher (Trade Federation)|missile launchers]] to use in its defense if the shields were disrupted. The satellite was also protected by a number of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]]. It was [[Disruption of Comm 4|destroyed]] during an orbital assault by members of the [[Naboo Resistance|Naboo resistance]] who were fighting back against the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]]. The destruction of Comm 4 temporarily shut down the base it controlled, allowing the resistance to [[Attack on disabled base|assault it]].<ref name="Star Wars: Battle for Naboo" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Comm 4 satellite appears in a mission from the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''. The primary objective of the mission is to destroy the satellite.<ref name="Star Wars: Battle for Naboo" />

*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' {{1st}}
